---
title: "The Rev. William Beadon Heathcote"
---

## The Rev. William Beadon Heathcote

**Dates:** (1812-1862)

### Description

precentor of Salisbury Cathedral

### Biography

Son of the Rev. Gilbert Heathcote, Vicar of Hursley;  he was precentor of Salisbury Cathedral till his death; he wrote hymns; he was Warden of Radley College 1852-3;  he married (1852) Elizabeth Mary Deane.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
